function.message: I could not safely complete this inbox item because one of the five requested OCR source files does not exist in the workspace: `50_finance/purchases/_2025_12_04__eur_000072__bill__toy_forge_pla_bundle.md`. I made no file edits and did not delete the inbox item to avoid partial processing. Please confirm the correct 5th file path (or whether item 5 is a duplicate of item 4), and I can process all requested records in one pass.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox workflow and completeness/no-partial guidance: process lowest inbox file, use OCR+schema docs, and stop for clarification when required data (requested file path) is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly lists 5 OCR targets in `00_inbox/724_next-task.md`; however, search for `_2025_12_04__eur_000072__bill__toy_forge_pla_bundle.md` returned a match only in the inbox text and not as a real file under `50_finance/purchases`. Per outcome rules, missing referenced files require OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION rather than partial completion.
